requirement_topic.en: STEG / ANME Storage, Renewable-Energy, and Grid-Connection Review
requirement_topic.zh: STEG / ANME储能、可再生能源及并网审查
requirement_topic.zht: STEG / ANME儲能、再生能源及併網審查

summary.en: A Tunisia grid-connected BESS should be treated as a project-specific utility and energy-regulatory review. STEG is the electricity utility and grid interface, while ANME publishes renewable-energy, self-generation, and energy-transition resources and lists for PV-related programs. Depending on the project model, BESS may need STEG connection studies, protection and metering approval, dispatch or operating conditions, ANME / energy-ministry renewable-energy documentation, and contract-specific storage controls.
summary.zh: 突尼斯并网BESS应按项目特定的公用事业和能源监管审查处理。STEG是电力公用事业和电网接口，ANME发布可再生能源、自发电和能源转型资源及光伏相关项目清单。根据项目模式，BESS可能需要STEG接入研究、保护和计量批准、调度或运行条件、ANME/能源主管部门可再生能源文件，以及合同特定储能控制要求。
summary.zht: 突尼西亞併網BESS應按項目特定的公用事業和能源監管審查處理。STEG是電力公用事業和電網介面，ANME發布再生能源、自發電和能源轉型資源及光伏相關項目清單。根據項目模式，BESS可能需要STEG接入研究、保護和計量批准、調度或運行條件、ANME／能源主管部門再生能源文件，以及合同特定儲能控制要求。

standards_or_laws: Project-specific power-purchase, self-generation, tender, or concession documents

summary.en: China-side grid files commonly include GB/T 36558-2023, PCS factory settings, protection studies, and grid-company commissioning records. They are useful evidence but do not replace STEG connection approval or Tunisia project authorization.
summary.zh: 中国侧并网文件通常包括GB/T 36558-2023、PCS出厂整定、保护研究和电网公司调试记录。这些文件是有用证据，但不能替代STEG接入批准或突尼斯项目授权。
summary.zht: 中國側併網文件通常包括GB/T 36558-2023、PCS出廠整定、保護研究和電網公司調試記錄。這些文件是有用證據，但不能替代STEG接入批准或突尼西亞項目授權。

gap.en: Prepare a Tunisia-specific grid package covering point of connection, voltage class, short-circuit duty, protection coordination, anti-islanding, active and reactive power control, ramp-rate limits, metering, SCADA / telemetry, dispatch instructions, commissioning tests, and storage operating modes.
gap.zh: 应准备突尼斯特定并网资料包，涵盖接入点、电压等级、短路容量、保护配合、防孤岛、有功和无功控制、爬坡率限制、计量、SCADA/远动、调度指令、调试测试和储能运行模式。
gap.zht: 應準備突尼西亞特定併網資料包，涵蓋接入點、電壓等級、短路容量、保護配合、防孤島、有功和無功控制、爬坡率限制、計量、SCADA／遠動、調度指令、調試測試和儲能運行模式。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected BESS where STEG connection, ANME / energy-ministry project route, tender, PPA, self-generation approval, owner, insurer, or lender requires approval; details are project-specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or contract-specific for China grid-connected BESS through grid-company technical review and commissioning acceptance

source.publisher: Société Tunisienne de l'Electricité et du Gaz (STEG)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China grid evidence is not STEG acceptance. Treat Tunisia BESS interconnection as a project-specific STEG / ANME and contract review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国并网证据不是STEG接受结论。应将突尼斯BESS并网作为项目特定的STEG/ANME和合同审查处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國併網證據不是STEG接受結論。應將突尼西亞BESS併網作為項目特定的STEG／ANME和合同審查處理。
